meaning: adj.空白的,空着的,失色的,没有表情的n.空白,<美> 表格
examples: Do we have a blank video ?
I'm sorry, but my mind is a blank.
Extra blank paper will probably come in useful.
Perhaps you draw a blank every time you introduce a new colleague to co-workers.
Designers see the rooms as a blank canvas and a break from demanding clients.
